title: Ubiquiti UniFi Premium Patch Cable, Etherlighting, Cat6a, 0,3m

Thanks to its lighting effects, the cable interactively displays the status of Ethernet ports . The cableâs outer diameter is just 3mm, and the total length, including connectors, is 30cm. As is typical for UniFi solutions, the cable is supplied in an elegant white color and is intended for indoor use (1) Ultra-thin patch cable
